what_it_does: Project website/docs for DRiVEAvatar-style driven avatar animation.
succinct_summary: Best treated as method and demo reference rather than a direct runtime dependency.
possible_use: Mine the project page for papers, demos, and implementation links relevant to driving Morgan motion.
important_notes: Website repo may not contain executable training/inference code; follow upstream links if deeper evaluation is needed. README hint: DRiVEAvatar.github.io
